jobs.rawDescription: Staff LLM Interaction Engineer (Europe remote - TS/Vue/NodeJS) The AI orchestration of your wildest imagination. n8n is the open workflow orchestration platform built for the new era of AI. We give technical teams the freedom of code with the speed of no-code, so they can automate faster, smarter, and without limits. Backed by a fiercely inventive community and 500+ builder-approved integrations, we’re changing the way people bring systems together and scale ideas for impact. Since our founding in 2019, we’ve grown into a diverse team of over 220 - working across Europe and the US, connected by a shared builder spirit and with our centre of gravity in Berlin. Along the way, we’ve: Cultivated a community of more than 650,000 active developers and builders Earned 145k+ GitHub stars, making us one of the world’s Top 40 most popular projects Been ranked as one of Europe’s most promising privately held SaaS startups (4th in Sifted’s 2025 B2B SaaS Rising 100) Raised $240m to date, from Sequoia’s first German seed to our recent $180m Series C - bringing us to a $2.5bn valuation That’s the company we’ve built. Now we’d love to see what you can build. If you’re applying, try n8n out - whether you’re technical or not - and share a screenshot of your first workflow with us. The easiest place to start is here: app.n8n.cloud/register . We’re in a defining moment of an incredible journey. Come and build with us. The role As a Staff level LLM Interaction Engineer , you’ll help shape how n8n’s AI Workflow Builder works end-to-end. This staff level engineering role is focused on a critical product challenge: allowing both technical or less-technically proficient users of n8n to turn AI powered automated workflows into something they can rely on every day. That means building systems that consistently generate the right output, stay grounded in the user’s workflow, and improve quickly through iteration and evaluation. You’ll work on the orchestration layer between users, workflows, a

score.reason: Staff-level role with perfect tech stack (Vue/TypeScript/Node) and Spain explicitly listed for location. AI orchestration domain aligns with Claude expertise. Incomplete job description limits full scope clarity.

needsReview.title: Engineering Lead (TypeScript /Node.js)
needsReview.rawDescription: Engineering Lead (TypeScript /Node.js) About Voodoo Founded in 2013, Voodoo is a tech company that creates mobile games and apps with a mission to entertain the world. Gathering 800 employees, 7 billion downloads, and over 200 million active users, Voodoo is the #3 mobile publisher worldwide in terms of downloads after Google and Meta. Our portfolio includes chart-topping games like Mob Control and Block Jam, alongside popular apps such as BeReal and Wizz. Team The Engineering & Data team builds innovative tech products and platforms to support the impressive growth of their gaming and consumer apps which allow Voodoo to stay at the forefront of the mobile gaming industry. Role We’re looking for an Engineering Lead (TypeScript/Node.js) to join our Engineering & Data team. As an Engineering Lead, you'll combine strong individual technical contributions with team leadership. You'll be responsible for the technical direction of your squad, the growth of your engineers, and the delivery of high-impact projects. This is a hybrid IC/manager role — you'll still write code, but your leverage is through the team. Lead the technical direction and architecture for your squad's domain Drive design reviews, set coding standards, and ensure engineering excellence Own the full delivery of complex, cross-team technical initiatives Build, scale and operate Node.js/TypeScript backend services on AWS/EKS Define the infrastructure and reliability strategy for your team's systems Partner with Product and Data to translate business goals into technical roadmaps Grow engineers through 1:1s, code reviews, mentorship and technical coaching Identify systemic risks and drive improvements before they become incidents Be an ambassador for engineering culture: psychological safety, pragmatism, and craft Profile (MUST have) 7+ years of professional software engineering experience 2+ years of experience leading an engineering team (formal or informal) Expert-level proficiency in TypeScript

needsReview.title: Senior Software Engineer - TypeScript /Node.js
needsReview.rawDescription: Senior Software Engineer - TypeScript /Node.js About Voodoo Founded in 2013, Voodoo is a tech company that creates mobile games and apps with a mission to entertain the world. Gathering 800 employees, 7 billion downloads, and over 200 million active users, Voodoo is the #3 mobile publisher worldwide in terms of downloads after Google and Meta. Our portfolio includes chart-topping games like Mob Control and Block Jam, alongside popular apps such as BeReal and Wizz. Team The Engineering & Data team builds innovative tech products and platforms to support the impressive growth of their gaming and consumer apps which allow Voodoo to stay at the forefront of the mobile gaming industry. You’ll join our Engineering team, working within a dedicated squad of up to 10 members. This role offers a unique chance to collaborate closely, innovate, and drive impactful results end-to-end. Role We’re looking for a Senior Software Engineer to join our Engineering & Data team. In this role, you’ll take full ownership of your scope from solution design to deployment, balancing quality with efficient delivery. Design & build business-focused full-stack applications in a cutting-edge, evolving environment Contribute to our state-of-the-art growth engine, helping scale apps & games to millions of users Participate in business strategy discussions and consistently deliver innovative solutions to business teams Demonstrate technical excellence and help define best practices — write the code others aspire to Develop team tooling and be a driving force behind improvement proposals Support teammates' growth Own features end-to-end: from architecture and implementation to deployment and monitoring Work with event-driven systems (SQS/SNS) to build robust, decoupled services Profile (MUST have) 5+ years of professional software engineering experience Strong proficiency in TypeScript/ Node.js (NestJS) Good knowledge of industry best practices (SOLID, KISS, YAGNI, DDD, TDD...)
